Sacramento State · Department of History
Give Now

Day of
Giving

March 4–5, 2026  ·  48 Hours Only
■ Two days. Give today. ■
#2
You don’t have to go to a UC for a world-class history education. Sacramento State graduates more historians than almost every university in California.
They chose this department. Now it’s your turn.

This department was built for students who work hard and expect the same from their education. Your gift keeps that promise.

I
The Clio Our nationally award-winning student journal. Real scholarship, real credentials, real careers launched.
II
Shattuck Symposium and Speaker Series World-class scholars on our campus. Standing room only, every time.
III
Shattuck Lounge For a commuter campus, space is a lifeline. A place to land, connect, and belong.
IV
Community Programs Study salons, belonging workshops, events that keep students in school and in each other’s orbit.
March 4th & 5th only
Make Your Gift Now
Support the Sacramento State History Department →

For history. For the students who chose us. Thank you for being part of what this department is becoming.

Dr. Jeff Wilson
Chair, Department of History · Sacramento State
P.S. No budget right now? Share this. Forward it. Post it. Text it. Every action during Day of Giving moves the needle. Show up for us →
